No. 673/05/2013-Cus.VIII, dated 30.05.2013 under the said sub-section directing that Shri Kishor Sindhi @ Kishor Kumar @ Kishor, resident of 468/ 33, Sanjay Bhawan, Pal Beechla Road, Andheri Pulia, Near Veer Balika School, Ajmer-05001, be detained and kept in custody in the Central Jail, Jaipur with a view to preventing him from smuggling the goods in future. 2. Whereas the Central Government has reasons to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded or has been concealing himself so that the order cannot be executed. 3. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 7 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby directs the aforesaid person to appear before the Director General of Police, Govt. of Rajasthan, Jaipur within 7 days of the publication of this order in the Official Gazette. [F. No. 673/05/2013-Cus. VIII] SANDEEP M. BHATNAGAR, Jt. Whereas the Central Government has reasons to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded or has been concealing himself so that the order cannot be executed. 3. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 7 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby directs the aforesaid person to appear before the Director General of Police, Govt. of Rajasthan, Jaipur within 7 days of the publication of this order in the Official Gazette. [F. No. 673/06/2013-Cus. VIII] SANDEEP M. BHATNAGAR, Jt. Secy. -- 2 of 2 --
